description: Percival Patch 11 (29 November 2019) — Uncle Frost is Back, New Avatar Available, Avalonian Mob Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Uncle Frost is Back
sections.searchable_text: Uncle Frost is Back Uncle Frost

sections.heading: New Avatar Available
sections.searchable_text: New Avatar Available Adventurer Avatar Adventurer Avatar Ring

sections.heading: Avalonian Mob Changes

items.text: The Avalon Archer's Hitpoints have been increased by 50% and her Fame has been reduced by 33%
After extensive fasting and meditation, the Avalonian Acolyte's "Incense" spell has grown stronger

sections.searchable_text: Avalonian Mob Changes The Avalon Archer's Hitpoints have been increased by 50% and her Fame has been reduced by 33% After extensive fasting and meditation, the Avalonian Acolyte's "Incense" spell has grown stronger

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Disarray (AKA Zerg Debuff)

items.text: Values and escalation for Disarray have been updated. For the new values and an explanation of the changes, please see this forum post: forum.albiononline.com/index.p…?postID=964642#post964642

subsections.searchable_text: Disarray (AKA Zerg Debuff) Values and escalation for Disarray have been updated. For the new values and an explanation of the changes, please see this forum post: forum.albiononline.com/index.p…?postID=964642#post964642

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Arcane Protection (all Arcane Staffs) Duration: 4s → 2s Shield Strength: 169.59 → 300.00

subsections.heading: Axes

subitems.text: Now multiple players can stack the bleed on the same target

subsections.searchable_text: Axes Rending Bleed (all Axes) Now multiple players can stack the bleed on the same target Axe Bleed (all Axes) Healing Reduction per stack: 5% → 4% Damage per Tick: 5.2 → 5.4

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Exploding Bolt (all Crossbows) Damage: 102.73 → 130.00 Hit Delay: 0.4s → 0.2s Standtime: 0.4s→ 0.3s

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Giant Steps (Forge Hammers) Physical Resistance: 0.59 → 0.35

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs

subitems.text: Healing a target on Max Stacks don't give energy anymore
Instead Max Stacks triggers an AoE Heal on the target; healing up to 5 allies for 50 in a 5m radius

subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Sacred Pulse (all Holy Staffs) Knockback Distance: 8m → 12m Cooldown: 10s → 8s Flash Heal (all Holy Staffs) Max Stacks: 2 → 3 Healing a target on Max Stacks don't give energy anymore Instead Max Stacks triggers an AoE Heal on the target; healing up to 5 allies for 50 in a 5m radius Base Heal: 48 → 45

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs

subitems.text: Getting hit by enemy players no longer consumes Thorns stacks

subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Thorns (all Nature Staffs) Getting hit by enemy players no longer consumes Thorns stacks Spiritual Seed (Druid Staff) Cooldown: 20s → 25s

subsections.heading: Swords

subitems.text: Now directly applies a Heroic Charge on you
Max Health Debuff now only affects unmounted players

subsections.searchable_text: Swords Iron Will (all Swords) Now directly applies a Heroic Charge on you Parry Strike (all Swords) No longer silences enemies Spinning Blades (Dual Swords) Max Health Debuff now only affects unmounted players Soulless Stream (Galatine Pair) Cast Time: 0.9s → 1.1s

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Focused Run (Scholar Shoes) Movement Speed Increase: 100% → 70% Mark of Sacrifice (Hellion Shoes) Cast Range: 15m → 12m

subsections.heading: Mounts
subsections.searchable_text: Mounts Pierce Through (Siege Ballista) Cooldown: 10s → 20s Damage vs Mounts: 3% → 5% Damage vs Players: 1.5% → 2%

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Disarray (AKA Zerg Debuff) Values and escalation for Disarray have been updated. For the new values and an explanation of the changes, please see this forum post: forum.albiononline.com/index.p…?postID=964642#post964642 Arcane Staffs Arcane Protection (all Arcane Staffs) Axes Rending Bleed (all Axes) Axe Bleed (all Axes) Crossbows Exploding Bolt (all Crossbows) Hammers Giant Steps (Forge Hammers) Holy Staffs Sacred Pulse (all Holy Staffs) Flash Heal (all Holy Staffs) Nature Staffs Thorns (all Nature Staffs) Spiritual Seed (Druid Staff) Swords Iron Will (all Swords) Parry Strike (all Swords) Spinning Blades (Dual Swords) Soulless Stream (Galatine Pair) Shoes Focused Run (Scholar Shoes) Mark of Sacrifice (Hellion Shoes) Mounts Pierce Through (Siege Ballista) Miscellaneous Healing Sickness Debuff duration: 2s → 5s

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Zerg debuffs no longer apply to active GvG participants, regardless of how many allies are in the cluster
Updated the Guild Season reward brackets listed in the Rankings UI to display their correct values
T6 Morgana mobs that snuck into T4 dungeons have been kicked out
Fixed an issue where farm buildings could not be demolished after picking up a grown crop or animal
Time Freeze (Great Arcane Staff): stun and invincibility now have the same duration, as intended
Additional numerous visual, animation, audio, terrain, and localization fixes

sections.searchable_text: Fixes Zerg debuffs no longer apply to active GvG participants, regardless of how many allies are in the cluster Updated the Guild Season reward brackets listed in the Rankings UI to display their correct values Crystal: 180,000 points Gold: 60,000 points Silver: 15,000 points Bronze: 3,500 points Iron: 1,000 points T6 Morgana mobs that snuck into T4 dungeons have been kicked out Fixed an issue where farm buildings could not be demolished after picking up a grown crop or animal Time Freeze (Great Arcane Staff): stun and invincibility now have the same duration, as intended Additional numerous visual, animation, audio, terrain, and localization fixes
